code:
export const blogPosts = { week1: { title: "Setting the Foundation", date: "Week 1 — The Beginning", images: ["WEEK 1.jpg", "WEEK 1.jpg"], content: `

During first week of my internship, I attended orientation and became familiar with the organization's environment. Ma'am Mitchelle, Administrative Officer, introduced rules, policies, and expectations for interns. I was also introduced to staff members who would be supervising me.

My tasks were primarily clerical, including organizing documents, arranging files, and encoding data in Google Sheets. I also observed daily operations of office to better understand its workflow and procedures.

This week helped me adjust to workplace environment and understand basic office operations.

` }, week2: { title: "Taking Initiative", date: "Week 2 — Making the Most of Limited Time", images: ["W2.jpg", "W2.jpg"], content: `

During the second week of my internship, While waiting for tasks to be assigned to me, I helped my co-intern organize the tasks given to her by the staff. This helped me stay productive and use my time well.

I also continued to observe the daily activities in the office and became more familiar with how things work. During this week, we also celebrated Valentine's Day in the office, which created a fun and enjoyable atmosphere. Helping my co-intern improved my teamwork and communication skills because we worked together to finish the tasks.

Overall, the second week helped me become more active and responsible, as I learned to take initiative even when no tasks were given to me.

` }, week3: { title: "Building Accuracy Through Practice", date: "Week 3 — RESPONSIBILITY", images: ["W3.jpg", "W3.jpg"], content: `

During the third week of my internship, my tasks mainly involved clerical work and assisting Ma'am Rubs, who guided me throughout these tasks. She first asked me to encode data because the soft copy had been lost, so I helped recreate the records by entering the information again.

This task required careful attention to detail to make sure the data was accurate and complete. In addition, I continued to assist with other clerical duties such as organizing documents and checking files when needed.

Overall, this week helped improve my data encoding skills, attention to detail, and patience, as I learned the importance of keeping records properly organized and backed up.

` }, week4: { title: "Improving Accuracy and Efficiency", date: "Week 4 — ORGANIZATION", images: ["W4.jpg", "W4.jpg"], content: `

This week, I continued assisting Ma'am Rubs with clerical tasks. My main responsibilities included organizing both physical and digital files, as well as encoding data into spreadsheets. I used tools such as Microsoft Excel and also google sheet to input, manage, and update records efficiently.

Through these activities, I learned the importance of accurate documentation and proper file management in maintaining an organized office system. I also improved my typing speed and overall data entry skills.

One challenge I encountered was ensuring the accuracy of the information I encoded. To address this, I learned to double-check my work carefully to avoid errors and ensure the reliability of the data.

` }, week5: { title: "Building Efficiency Through Proper Documentation", date: "Week 5 — RECORD KEEPING", images: ["W5.jpg", "W5.jpg"], content: `

During the fifth week, I assisted the staff in organizing and maintaining office documents. I helped arrange files, prepare documents for printing, and ensure that records were properly stored and labeled for easy retrieval.

This experience helped me understand the importance of organized documentation in supporting smooth office operations. It also improved my attention to detail and strengthened my ability to manage tasks efficiently in a workplace setting.

` }, week6: { title: "Keeping Information Accurate and Organized", date: "Week 6 — RECORD MAINTENANCE", images: ["W6.jpg", "W6.jpg"], content: `

This week, I reviewed existing documents and helped update records to ensure that all information was accurate and properly maintained. I also organized both digital and physical files by sorting documents, renaming files, and placing them in their appropriate folders.

Through these tasks, I learned the importance of maintaining updated and well-organized records in an office environment. This experience also improved my file management skills and taught me how proper organization contributes to efficiency and smoother workflow in the workplace.

` }, week7: { title: "Building Relationships", date: "Week 7 — Connections", images: ["W7.jpg", "W7.jpg"], content: `

During this week, it was my last week in the Administrative Office because I was transferred to the Dean's Office. During my remaining days, I continued organizing both digital and physical records. I helped sort documents, rename files, and place them in their appropriate folders.

This experience helped me improve my organizational and file management skills. It also taught me the importance of keeping records properly arranged to maintain an efficient workflow in the office.

` }, week8: { title: "Halfway Point Analysis", date: "Week 8 — Assessment", images: ["W8.jpg", "W8.jpg"], content: `

During this week, it was my first week in the Dean's Office. The first thing Sir Dan did was orient me about the history of the Graduate School and the departments under its supervision. He also introduced me to their official website and explained its purpose and functions. In addition, he oriented me about the tasks I would be doing in the following weeks and discussed the expected final output of my internship.

During this week, I also started creating the layout and design for a program invitation. I can say that it was challenging because I am not very creative when it comes to designing, but I still tried my best. I considered this task as a good opportunity to practice and improve my creativity and layout skills.

` }, week9: { title: "Going Deeper", date: "Week 9 — Deep Dive", images: ["W9.jpg", "W9.jpg"], content: `

During this week, it was Holy Week, so we only had three working days in the office. During these days, I continued working on the design for the Recognition Program. I regularly showed my design to Sir Dan to ask if it was approved or if there were changes needed. I also asked for suggestions to improve the overall design and make it more presentable.

This experience helped me improve my creativity and taught me the importance of accepting feedback and making revisions to produce a better output.

` }, week10: { title: "Putting Knowledge to Work", date: "Week 10 — Application", images: ["W10.jpg", "W10.jpg"], content: `

During this week, I continued working on different design tasks assigned by Sir Dan. He asked me to create a layout design for the tarpaulin of their guest speaker. While making the design, I regularly showed it to Sir Dan to check whether it was acceptable or if there were changes needed. I also asked for suggestions to further improve the layout and make it more presentable.

This experience helped me improve my designing and layout skills. It also taught me the importance of receiving feedback and making revisions to create a better and more professional output.

` }, week11: { title: "Creative Problem Solving", date: "Week 11 — Innovation", images: ["W11.jpg", "W11.jpg"], content: `

During this week, I continued working on layout and design tasks. This time, I was assigned to create the profile picture and cover photo for their Facebook page. While making the designs, I carefully arranged the elements and followed the suggestions given to improve the overall appearance.

This task helped me improve my creativity and editing skills, especially in making designs suitable for social media pages. It also taught me the importance of creating simple yet presentable layouts that represent the office professionally.

` }, week12: { title: "Month Three Review", date: "Week 12 — Consolidation", images: ["W12.jpg", "W12.jpg"], content: `

During this week, I was assigned to create layout designs for their pubmats, which were used for posts and reminders about the files and forms needed by the students. I carefully arranged the information to make the designs clear, organized, and easy to understand.

This task helped me improve my layout and editing skills, especially in creating informative and presentable pubmats. It also taught me the importance of making announcements visually appealing so that students can easily read and understand the information provided.

` }, week13: { title: "Final Push Begins", date: "Week 13 — Sprint", images: ["W13.jpg", "W13.jpg"], content: `

During this week, because they transferred to a new office, I was assigned to design temporary signages so that students and visitors could easily locate the Dean's Office and the Secretary's Office. Aside from this, I also continued creating pubmat designs for announcements and reminders.

These tasks helped me improve my creativity and layout skills while also teaching me the importance of making clear and presentable designs for information and directions inside the office.

` }, week14: { title: "Polishing the Results", date: "Week 14 — Refinement", images: ["W14.jpg", "W14.jpg"], content: `

During this week, it was my last week of internship. Most of my tasks involved finalizing the designs and outputs so they could already be used once approved by Sir Dan. I reviewed and organized all of my completed tasks, then compiled them in Google Drive and sent them to Sir Dan for submission and future use.

Aside from finalizing my work, we also celebrated my last day in the office. I felt thankful for the experiences, lessons, and guidance that I received during my internship. My time in the office helped me improve my skills, gain confidence, and learn more about working in a professional environment.

` } };

` }, };
